steps.title: Determine Inductance
steps.description: Calculate L from filtering or energy-storage requirements.

steps.title: Check Rated Current
steps.description: Keep current below saturation rating with margin.

steps.title: Evaluate DCR
steps.description: Lower DCR reduces power loss and heating.

steps.title: Consider SRF
steps.description: Operating frequency must be below self-resonant frequency.

steps.title: Choose Core
steps.description: Ferrite for size, iron powder for high current, air for Radio Frequency (RF).

tips: Use shielded types to reduce Electromagnetic Interference (EMI)
